# Simple CAPI

Simple CAPI is an upcoming service that makes secure Meta Conversions API tracking easier to launch and manage across client accounts.

## Product direction

Simple CAPI is designed to create isolated server-side conversion endpoints, keep Meta credentials out of browser code, and support browser/server event deduplication.

## Availability

The public product launch is coming soon. Current product information and future launch updates are published on the canonical website.

## Canonical page

- [Simple CAPI](https://simplecapi.com/): Official product homepage and launch status.
